category_sources: source_facts.description says platform-neutral API for system-level and libc-like functions; official Firefox Source Docs say NSPR provides that API.
display_name_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs page title is NSPR; source_facts.name is nspr.
docs_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs NSPR page provides documentation, API reference, build instructions, and getting NSPR sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is Mozilla's Mercurial NSPR project; official Firefox Source Docs build/source instructions refer to hg.mozilla.org/projects/nspr.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Firefox Source Docs describe NSPR as a platform-neutral runtime API library.
